features.description: Fix 26 compile errors in theo-application lib test target
features.acceptance: cargo test -p theo-application --no-run exits 0

features.description: Fix cargo warnings across workspace (unused imports, dead code, unused mut)
features.acceptance: cargo_warnings = 0 in eval output

features.description: Add tests to theo-api-contracts (currently 0 tests)
features.acceptance: 5+ tests for DTO serialization roundtrips

features.description: Add tests to theo-governance (currently 41 tests, lowest after api-contracts)
features.acceptance: 10+ new tests for sandbox policy, impact analysis

features.description: Add robustness tests to theo-engine-graph (currently 43 tests)
features.acceptance: 5+ robustness tests (malformed files, empty graph, encoding)

features.description: Add tests to theo-application once it compiles (currently 58 tests)
features.acceptance: 10+ new tests for pipeline, extraction, context assembly

features.description: Add edge case tests for convergence, agent loop, tool registry
features.acceptance: 10+ new tests across convergence, agent loop, tool registry

features.description: Create clippy.toml at workspace root with reasonable thresholds
features.acceptance: clippy.toml exists with too-many-arguments-threshold and type-complexity-threshold

features.description: Create .theo/AGENTS.md — navigation map for the agent (NOT a manual). Crate→responsibility, how to test, what NOT to touch
features.acceptance: .theo/AGENTS.md exists, >500 bytes, covers all 13 crates

features.description: Create .theo/QUALITY_RULES.md — consolidated mechanical quality rules (no unwrap, no dead_code, clippy clean, boundary tests pass)
features.acceptance: .theo/QUALITY_RULES.md exists, >500 bytes, lists all enforced rules

features.description: Create .theo/QUALITY_SCORE.md — per-crate health dashboard (compiles, tests, warnings, unwraps)
features.acceptance: .theo/QUALITY_SCORE.md exists, >500 bytes, table with all 13 crates

features.description: Create crates/theo-governance/tests/structural_hygiene.rs with 10+ structural code quality tests (no println in libs, no huge files, no circular deps, doc comments on public types)
features.acceptance: structural_hygiene.rs exists with 10+ #[test] functions, all pass

features.description: Expand boundary_test.rs from 5 to 15+ tests: add circular dep detection, benchmark isolation, engine-to-engine boundary checks
features.acceptance: boundary_tests >= 15 in eval output

features.description: Expand structural_hygiene.rs to 30+ tests: file size limits, unwrap-free zones, doc comment coverage, no std::process::exit outside main
features.acceptance: structural_tests >= 30 in eval output

features.description: Fix clippy warnings in leaf crates first (theo-domain, theo-governance, theo-api-contracts) to avoid cascading rebuilds
features.acceptance: cargo clippy -p theo-domain -p theo-governance -p theo-api-contracts reports 0 warnings

features.description: Fix clippy warnings in engine crates (theo-engine-parser, theo-engine-graph, theo-engine-retrieval)
features.acceptance: cargo clippy for engine crates reports 0 warnings

features.description: Fix clippy warnings in runtime and infra crates (theo-agent-runtime, theo-infra-llm, theo-tooling)
features.acceptance: cargo clippy for runtime/infra crates reports 0 warnings

features.description: Replace unwrap() with proper error handling in leaf crates (theo-domain, theo-governance). Use ? operator or explicit match.
features.acceptance: unwrap_count in these crates reduced by 80%+

features.description: Replace unwrap() in engine crates. Focus on hot paths first.
features.acceptance: unwrap_count in engine crates reduced by 50%+

features.description: Remove all #[allow(dead_code)] attributes. Either use the code or delete it.
features.acceptance: dead_code_attrs = 0 in eval output

meta.note: Agent updates status to 'in_progress' or 'done'. Do NOT remove or rewrite entries. Do NOT edit acceptance criteria.
